specific_question: In the fiscal year 2024, what was MediConn's customer retention rate for patients who contacted support?
answer: According to MediConn's business development data, during fiscal year 2024, 87% of patients who contacted customer service remained active MediConn users after 6 months, compared to 82% who never contacted support.
dr_question: According to an article published on TechTarget.com in 2024, excellent patient communication is critical for a successful customer service department. How can MediConn Solutions improve patient communication in order to reduce service calls into Q12025?
